allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\papak\\Desktop\\harmony-ai\\harmony-ai"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\papak\\Desktop\\harmony"; Get-ChildItem $src -Exclude "node_modules",".next" | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination \(Join-Path $dst $_.Name\) -Recurse -Force }; Write-Output "Copied successfully")

PowerShell($base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/master/weights"; $dest = "C:\\Users\\papak\\Desktop\\harmony\\public\\models"; $files = @\("tiny_face_detector_model-shard1","tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json","face_expression_recognition_model-shard1","face_expression_recognition_model-weights_manifest.json"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Write-Output "Downloading $f..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$f" -OutFile "$dest\\$f" -UseBasicParsing }; Write-Output "Done.")

PowerShell($port = 3000; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pids = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($pid in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $pid" } } else { Write-Output "No process on port $port" })

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty models | Format-Table name, size -AutoSize } catch { Write-Output "Ollama not reachable: $_" })
Bash(git commit -m 'Add voice TTS/STT, facial landmark detection, and full emotion signals *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']; [print\(m['name'],m.get\('size','?'\)\) for m in models]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(git commit -m 'Add '\\''Back to dashboard'\\'' card to chat page left panel *)
